tests.title: Typing an autotrigger followed by a space expands its body in place with no popup and no accept; a second autotrigger immediately expands again (re-armed chain)
errors: Error: TauriPage command 'wait_for_function' failed: waitForFunction timeout: window.__PPE_E2E__.getEditorText().includes("\\tilde{}")

tests.title: Typing a regex trigger substitutes its capture group into the body and expands in place with no popup; the matched trigger text is gone and the capture is the real matched letter, not a literal $1
errors: Error: TauriPage command 'wait_for_function' failed: waitForFunction timeout: window.__PPE_E2E__.getEditorText().includes("\\bar{p}")
